item.description:
New:
  • Stable identity, beta migration, Sparkle beta channel
  • Bridge build for beta→release graduation
  • Tauri migration manifest (latest.json) on stable releases
  • Vendor tokscale LICENSE, RunCat credit, public-facing README
  • Glass-over-wallpaper screenshots for the public README
  • Wider hero + 3D screenshots with more wallpaper breathing room
  • Visual rewrite — image-forward, less prose
